title: Rotary livestock feeder with gravity flow feed openings
abstract: A feeder (10) for dispensing feed to livestock includes a trough (11) and a hopper (12) mounted above the trough (11). The hopper (12) includes a sidewall, a bottom (20), a central feed discharge hole (21) through the bottom (20), and a plurality of gravity flow feed openings (30) arranged around the central feed discharge hole (21). A deflector (22) is mounted in the hopper (12) above and vertically spaced from the hopper bottom (20) to cover the central feed discharge hole (21) to restrict gravity flow of feed from the hopper (12) through the central feed discharge hole (21). A sweep member (25) is mounted for rotation about a vertical axis for sweeping feed under the deflector (22) to the central feed discharge hole (21) for discharge into the trough (11). A closure system (31) is associated with the gravity flow feed openings (30) to automatically close the gravity flow feed openings (30) once animals start moving the sweep member (25) to sweep feed to the central feed discharge hole (21).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A feeder (10) for dispensing feed to livestock, comprising: a hopper (12); a mechanical rotary feed flow system having a feed discharge hole (21) and an animal-activated sweep member (25) for sweeping feed from said hopper (12) into said feed discharge hole (21) for discharge from said hopper (12); characterized by: a gravity flow feed system having at least one gravity flow feed opening (30) for allowing feed to flow by gravity from said hopper (12), said gravity flow feed opening (30) being separate from said feed discharge hole (21); and a closure system (31) associated with said gravity flow feed system, said closure system (31) having a first condition in which said gravity flow feed opening (30) is open to allow gravity feed flow through said gravity flow feed opening (30), and a second condition in which said gravity flow feed opening (30) is closed. 2. The feeder according to claim 1, further comprising an activator mechanism (35) arranged to move with said sweep member (25) to cause said closure system (31) to change from its first condition into its second condition. 3. The feeder according to claim 1, wherein said closure system (31) comprises a sliding door (33). 4. The feeder according to claim 1, wherein said closure system comprises a flip door (40) hinged to an underside of a bottom of the hopper (12). 5. The feeder according to claim 1, further comprising a trough (11) below said hopper (12) for receiving feed that flows from said hopper (12) through said gravity flow feed opening (30) and for receiving feed discharged from said hopper (12) through said feed discharge hole (21). 6. The feeder according to claim 1, wherein said hopper (12) comprises a sidewall and a bottom (20), said central feed discharge hole (21) and said at least one gravity flow feed opening (30) extend through the bottom (20) of said hopper (12), and said gravity flow feed opening (30) is located between said central feed discharge hole (21) and the sidewall of said hopper (12). 7. The feeder according to claim 6, wherein said mechanical rotary flow feed flow system comprises a deflector (22) mounted in said hopper (12) above said hopper bottom (20) and vertically spaced from said hopper bottom (20), said deflector (22) covering said central feed discharge hole (21) to restrict gravity flow of feed from said hopper (12) through said central feed discharge hole (21), and said sweep member (25) is mounted for rotation about a vertical axis, said sweep member (25) being located between said deflector (22) and said hopper bottom (20) for sweeping feed to said central feed discharge hole (21) to discharge therethrough. 8. The feeder according to claim 7, wherein said at least one gravity flow feed opening (30) comprises a plurality of openings (30) in the bottom (20) of said hopper (12) that are spaced in a circular pattern surrounding an outer periphery of said deflector (22). 9. The feeder according to claim 8, wherein said closure system (31) comprises a plurality of slide doors (33), each slide door (33) having a first position in which a respective gravity flow feed opening (30) is open and a second position in which the respective gravity flow feed opening (30) is closed by the slide door (33). 10. The feeder according to claim 9, wherein said closure system (31) further comprises a mounting structure (32) having a plurality of recessed areas (34) for receiving the slide doors (33), said slide doors (33) being slidable within said recessed areas (34) along respective radial lines extending from said vertical axis. 11. The feeder according to claim 9, wherein said sweep member (25) is operably coupled with a feed wheel (13) disposed in a trough (11) below said hopper (12) so that 

 animal-induced rotation of said feed wheel (13) in said trough (11) causes rotation of said sweep member (25) in said hopper (12) for sweeping feed to said central feed discharge hole (21) for discharge into said trough (11). 12. The feeder according to claim 11, further comprising an activator mechanism (35) associated with said feed wheel (13) that is arranged to cause said slide doors (33) to move from their first positions to their second positions upon rotation of said feed wheel (13). 13. The feeder according to claim 12, wherein said activator mechanism (35) comprises an activator pin (36) attached to said feed wheel (13), and said activator pin (36) is arranged to contact said slide doors (33) and force the slide doors (33) radially outwardly from their first positions to their second positions upon rotation of said feed wheel (13). 14. The feeder according to claim 13, wherein said feed wheel (13) comprises a hub (16) mounted to an axle (24) for rotation about said vertical axis, and a plurality of spokes (15) extending radially outwardly from said hub (16), and said activator pin (36) extends upwardly from one of said spokes (15).
